ingredients_text: Chicken Breast (52%), Red Peppers (24%), 𝐒𝐨𝐲 And Rice Wine Sauce (14%) [Water, Brown Sugar, Rice Wine, 𝐒𝐨𝐲 Sauce (Water, 𝐒𝐨𝐲𝐚 𝐁𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐬, 𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭, Salt), Rice Vinegar, Molasses, Cornflour], Spring Onions (7%), Szechuan Style Spiced Marinade (2.5%) [Sugar, Spices, Cornflour, Salt, Tomato Powder, Dried Red Bell Pepper, Chilli Powder, Dehydrated Garlic, Dried Green Bell Pepper, Dehydrated Onion, Parsley, Paprika Extract, Oregano, Cumin Powder, Garlic Powder, Chilli Extract].
